name: memory-cognee-revised
description: Cognee-backed memory dataset manager for file-backed memory and library indexes. This plugin does not manage prompt context.

datasetName.description: Legacy compatibility field. Maps to datasets.memory.datasetName.

autoIndex.description: Legacy compatibility field. Maps to datasets.memory.autoIndex.

autoCognify.description: Legacy compatibility field. Maps to datasets.memory.autoCognify.

autoRecall.description: Legacy compatibility field. Accepted as memory dataset metadata only; this plugin does not inject runtime context.

deleteMode.description: Cognee delete mode for removed file-backed memory (default: soft)

maxResults.description: Maximum search results returned by CLI/tools (default: 6)

minScore.description: Minimum retrieval score after local ranking adjustment (default: 0)

maxTokens.description: Token cap passed to Cognee search (default: 512)

pinnedPaths.description: Legacy compatibility field for pinned memory note paths in the memory dataset.

pinnedMaxResults.description: Legacy compatibility field for the maximum number of pinned memory results.

memoryStoreMaxChars.description: Legacy compatibility field for the maximum text length accepted by memory_store.

summaryModel.description: Optional model ref or model id used for compact-memory distillation. Defaults to OpenClaw's configured primary model.

summaryProvider.description: Optional provider override for compact-memory distillation when summaryModel is not a full provider/model ref.

summaryMaxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens used when distilling compacted durable memory (default: 900).

retainedAssetWarnBytes.description: Soft warning threshold for total retained library bytes (default: 536870912).

retainedAssetWarnCount.description: Soft warning threshold for retained library asset count (default: 500).

retainedAssetMaxBytes.description: Optional hard limit for total retained library bytes. Imports fail after this budget is exceeded.

retainedAssetMaxCount.description: Optional hard limit for retained library asset count. Imports fail after this budget is exceeded.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for Cognee requests (default: 60000)

ingestionTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for add/update requests (default: 300000)

searchPrompt.description: Optional system prompt sent to Cognee search

datasets.description: Fixed dataset profiles. This plugin manages memory datasets only; it does not inject prompt context.

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for the primary memory dataset

autoIndex.description: Auto-sync the memory dataset on startup and after agent runs (default: true)

autoCognify.description: Run cognify after new memory entries are added (default: true)

autoRecall.description: Compatibility metadata only. This plugin does not inject runtime context.

searchType.description: Optional dataset-specific Cognee search mode for memory. Falls back to global searchType.

searchPrompt.description: Optional dataset-specific system prompt sent to Cognee search for memory.

maxTokens.description: Optional dataset-specific token cap passed to Cognee search for memory.

ingestMode.description: Optional dataset-specific ingestion profile for memory (default: distilled-note-first). This is advisory and does not require a rigid content type.

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for the explicit reference library dataset

paths.description: Explicit markdown roots for the library dataset

autoCognify.description: Run cognify after new library entries are added (default: false)

autoRecall.description: Compatibility metadata only. This plugin does not inject runtime context.

searchType.description: Optional dataset-specific Cognee search mode for library. Falls back to global searchType.

searchPrompt.description: Optional dataset-specific system prompt sent to Cognee search for library.

maxTokens.description: Optional dataset-specific token cap passed to Cognee search for library.

ingestMode.description: Optional dataset-specific ingestion profile for library (default: document-graph-first). This is advisory and does not require a rigid document taxonomy.
